properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus Is the Life, our confidence He is the Refuge in troubled times He is the Lighthouse we have to trust Through Him our lives would be in harmony

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus is the Way, Saviour of every soul He is the wholeness for everyone O' come my dear friend, let's worship Him Our precious lives He spared and redeemed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O' Jesus my life, I need You now O’ please forgive me, my iniquities I lift my all in all to You You are my Rock and my Foundation

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O’ come let us pray wholeheartedly The gracious love of God is eternity Adoration belongs to You Joy to Your creation, joy to everyone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: O' my sweet Jesus, Armour of my soul You are the Root and Breath of my life You're The Redeemer, The Defender of truth You are the love and The Giver of life
